immutable_core.semantic_intent: non-CRRT renal replacement therapy active state
immutable_core.semantic_definition: A positive-only episode asset retaining one row for each ICU-stay interval during which non-CRRT renal replacement therapy support is active under the approved source-evidence inclusion rule.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per positive state episode
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_non_crrt_rrt_active must preserve non-CRRT RRT active-state scope and must not silently widen to any-RRT, CRRT-family, exact modality episode detail, RRT fluid-removal events, first-day RRT summaries, RRT-free days, AKI/KDIGO phenotype truth, or renal SOFA truth. Hybrid and prolonged-intermittent modality handling must be explicitly documented by each mapping rather than silently changing the same-name boundary.

state_episode_contract.episode_start_rule: start at the approved non-CRRT RRT source interval start after source-faithful intervalization
state_episode_contract.episode_end_rule: end at the approved non-CRRT RRT source interval end after source-faithful intervalization
state_episode_contract.continuity_rule: merge overlapping or exactly contiguous approved non-CRRT source intervals within the same ICU stay; any positive gap starts a new episode
state_episode_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained positive non-CRRT RRT episode under the approved source-evidence rule

external_alignment.alignment_policy: Use external terminologies as semantic anchors when reliable, but do not make them the backbone of the standard-variable system.
external_alignment.note: The current MVP identity is governed primarily by reviewed database-specific non-CRRT interval evidence, ICU-stay interval semantics, and positive-only episode rules.

new_variable_trigger_examples: changing the concept to any-RRT active
changing the concept to CRRT-family active
changing the concept to exact RRT modality episode
changing the concept to RRT fluid-removal event
changing the output to first-day RRT summary
adding explicit false rows instead of positive-only retained episodes
version_bump_trigger_examples: adding a new reviewed database mapping while preserving non-CRRT RRT active-state meaning
tightening a duration caution threshold without changing retained state semantics
changing a documented ambiguous-source handling policy while preserving the same variable identity

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_non_crrt_rrt_active outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec. Execute-mode runtime evidence should record both spec hashes and formal output-file signatures.
execution_governance.future_non_bypassable_rule: Formal std_non_crrt_rrt_active outputs should be generated only through the governed execution.py path reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.
